Clear venue identity, strong atmosphere, multiple seating surfaces, real diners. Caption filename suggests Nov 2019 capture. Excellent for hero + gallery.

Marble bar counter with bartender working, exposed brick, dark wood panels, bottles of spirits and glassware lined up. Strong atmosphere and bar identity. Not a full dining-room view, so use as gallery/atmosphere rather than hero. Bartender identity may need release verification.
Overhead food/product shot: raw beef carpaccio with pistachio, tuna tartare-style dish in bowl, tomato salad. Useful as menu/dish reference but not venue representation.

Food shot — chuletón especial carne. Product reference only.

Chef/co-owner working in Apu Nena's kitchen — industrial kitchen background, person at work, hint of pass/line. Identifies the venue, but only mid-resolution (300×200) so quality needs upscale check. Identity release needed.
